text.content:
In the world of ag tires, one engineering innovation has consistently delivered superior performance across diverse field conditions: the 45-degree lug design.

This sophisticated lug design represents a significant advancement in tire technology, balancing the demanding requirements of modern farm equipment with the practical needs of today's grower. At MAXAM, our commitment to engineering excellence is embodied in our optimized tread design that harnesses this proven geometry.
